vineyards.name: Giuseppe Quintarelli
vineyards.address: Via Cerè 1, 37020 Negrar di Valpolicella, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment only; tastings at the historic cellar in Negrar. Very limited availability.
vineyards.description: The legendary Negrar estate founded in 1924, now run by Giuseppe's daughter Fiorenza. Quintarelli's Amarone and Recioto are benchmark expressions of dried-grape Valpolicella winemaking, aged for years before release.

vineyards.name: Dal Forno Romano
vineyards.address: Via Lodoletta 1, 37030 Cellore d'Illasi, Verona, Italy
vineyards.winemaker: Romano Dal Forno and Marco Dal Forno
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment only; private estate visit at Cellore d'Illasi.
vineyards.description: Founded by Romano Dal Forno in 1983 in the Illasi valley, outside the Classico zone. Tiny production, extremely low yields and very long maceration produce arguably the most powerful Amarone in the region.

vineyards.name: Allegrini
vineyards.address: Via Giare 9-11, 37022 Fumane, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Fumane estate and Villa della Torre; bookable via the estate website.
vineyards.description: Multi-generation family estate at Fumane at the heart of Valpolicella Classico. Allegrini pioneered single-vineyard bottlings in the zone and is widely credited with modernising Amarone's international profile in the 1980s under Giovanni Allegrini.

vineyards.name: Masi Agricola
vineyards.address: Via Monteleone, 37015 Gargagnago di Sant'Ambrogio di Valpolicella, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tastings at Serego Alighieri guest property and the Gargagnago winery.
vineyards.description: One of Valpolicella's oldest and most recognisable names, founded in 1772. The Boscaini family pioneered the ripasso technique. The historic Serego Alighieri property owned by Dante Alighieri's descendants is part of the Masi portfolio.

verified.address_quoted: Via Monteleone, 37015 Gargagnago di Sant'Ambrogio di Valpolicella (VR)

vineyards.name: Bertani
vineyards.address: Loc. Novare, 37024 Negrar di Valpolicella, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar tours and tastings bookable at the Novare estate; group and trade visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: A founding force in Valpolicella winemaking since 1857, Bertani codified the long-maceration Amarone style. Owned by Tenimenti Angelini since 2021 and still operating from the historic Novare cellars.

vineyards.name: Tommasi Viticoltori
vineyards.address: Via Ronchetto 2, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tasting and cellar visits at the San Pietro in Cariano estate; bookable online.
vineyards.description: Family estate in San Pietro in Cariano producing Amarone, Valpolicella and Ripasso across multiple vineyard parcels in the Classico zone since 1902. Fourth-generation winemaker Giancarlo oversees production.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ronchetto 2, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Zenato
vineyards.address: Via San Benedetto 8, 37019 Peschiera del Garda, Verona, Italy
vineyards.classification: Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG and Lugana DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at Peschiera del Garda; both Valpolicella and Lugana wines poured.
vineyards.description: Founded by Sergio Zenato in 1960, this estate bridges two zones: the Valpolicella hillside estates east of Negrar produce Amarone, and the Lake Garda shoreline vineyards at Peschiera yield benchmark Lugana from Turbiana.

verified.address_quoted: Via San Benedetto 8, 37019 Peschiera del Garda (VR)

vineyards.name: Speri Viticoltori
vineyards.address: Via Fontana 14, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar visits and seated tastings by appointment at San Pietro in Cariano.
vineyards.description: Six-generation family estate on the Monte Masua and Sant'Urbano hillsides of Fumane. Among the most traditional producers in the Classico zone; Luca Speri is the current winemaker.

verified.address_quoted: Via Fontana 14, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Tedeschi Vini
vineyards.address: Via G. Verdi 4, 37020 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by appointment; group tours of the historic cellar available.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1824, Tedeschi is one of the oldest family producers in Valpolicella Classico. The single-vineyard Amarone Capitel Monte Olmi is its flagship; sixth-generation Lorenzo Tedeschi manages the estate.

verified.address_quoted: Via G. Verdi 4, 37020 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Tenuta Sant'Antonio
vineyards.address: Via Ceriani 23, 37030 Mezzane di Sotto, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate tasting visits by appointment at Mezzane di Sotto; full range of Valpolicella and Amarone poured.
vineyards.description: The Castagnedi brothers established Tenuta Sant'Antonio in 1989 in the Mezzane valley east of the Classico zone. Their Campo dei Gigli Amarone from Oseleta and Corvina is a benchmark for the sub-zone style.

vineyards.name: Lorenzo Begali
vineyards.address: Via Cengia 10, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and cellar tours by appointment; intimate family atmosphere.
vineyards.description: Small family estate at San Pietro in Cariano producing Amarone and Recioto from very old Corvina vines on the Ca'Bianca cru. Consistently high quality with a traditional approach to drying and long cellaring.

verified.address_quoted: Via Cengia 10, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Zyme
vineyards.address: Via Ca' del Pipa 1, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.classification: Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG and Veronese IGT
vineyards.tasting_program: Private tastings by appointment at the San Pietro in Cariano cellar.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2001 by former Quintarelli cellarmaster Celestino Gaspari. Zyme spans tradition and innovation: the Amarone Kairos uses classic drying methods, while the Harlequin IGT blends 15 native and international varieties.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ca' del Pipa 1, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Brigaldara
vineyards.address: Via Brigaldara 20, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tastings by appointment at San Pietro in Cariano.
vineyards.description: A Cesari family estate in the heart of Valpolicella Classico, known for precise, age-worthy Amarone and a careful approach to appassimento in the estate's traditional fruttai.

verified.address_quoted: Via Brigaldara 20, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Ca' La Bionda
vineyards.address: Via Bionda 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by appointment on the Marano hillside estate.
vineyards.description: Family-run estate at the top of the Marano valley producing structured, traditional Amarone and Valpolicella from old vineyards on volcanic soils.

vineyards.name: Corte Sant'Alda
vineyards.address: Via Capovilla 28, 37030 Mezzane di Sotto, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tastings by appointment at Mezzane di Sotto; biodynamic vineyard tours available.
vineyards.description: Marinella Camerani's biodynamic estate in the Mezzane valley has been Demeter-certified since 2003. The Mithas Amarone and Soraigo Valpolicella are made with minimal intervention and long ageing in large oak.

vineyards.name: Pieropan
vineyards.address: Via Camuzzoni 3, 37038 Soave, Verona, Italy
vineyards.classification: Soave Superiore DOCG and Soave Classico DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the historic Soave cellar; bookable via the website.
vineyards.description: The reference producer for Soave since 1880, Pieropan produces single-vineyard bottlings La Rocca (volcanic tufa) and Calvarino (basalt and limestone) that define what world-class Garganega can achieve. Certified organic by Suolo e Salute since 2012.

vineyards.name: Inama Azienda Agricola
vineyards.address: Via IV Novembre 29, 37047 San Bonifacio, Verona, Italy
vineyards.classification: Soave Superiore DOCG and Colli Berici DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at San Bonifacio; Soave Classico and Colli Berici Carmenere tasting programmes.
vineyards.description: Founded by Giuseppe Inama in 1991, the estate spans Soave Classico hill vineyards and pioneered quality Carmenere in the Colli Berici DOC. The Vulcaia Soave from basalt soils is one of the appellation's most mineral expressions.

vineyards.name: Gini
vineyards.address: Via Matteotti 42, 37032 Monteforte d'Alpone, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tasting flights at Monteforte d'Alpone; booking required.
vineyards.description: The Gini family has farmed on the volcanic hillsides of Monteforte d'Alpone since the 17th century. La Frosca and Col Foscarin are their benchmark single-vineyard Soaves from ancient Garganega vines on basalt-rich soils.

vineyards.name: Suavia
vineyards.address: Via Centro 14, 37038 Soave, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits by appointment in the village of Soave.
vineyards.description: Sisters Alessandra and Meri Tessari run this compact estate in the village of Soave producing Classico and the single-cru Monte Carbonare from centenarian Garganega vines on volcanic tufa soils.

vineyards.name: Pra
vineyards.address: Via della Fontana 31, 37032 Monteforte d'Alpone, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar visit and tasting at Monteforte d'Alpone by appointment.
vineyards.description: Graziano Pra converted this Monteforte d'Alpone estate to organic viticulture and produces deeply terroir-driven Soave Classico Monte Grande from volcanic basalt and garnet-clay soils alongside the richer Otto bottling.

vineyards.name: Cantina di Soave
vineyards.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele II 94, 37038 Soave, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Public tasting room open daily in Soave town; walk-in welcome.
vineyards.description: The largest Soave cooperative, founded in 1898, representing 2,600 member growers across 6,000 hectares. Its premium Rocca Sveva line is entry-level access to the appellation; the visitor centre in town is walk-in friendly.

vineyards.name: Roberto Anselmi
vineyards.address: Via San Carlo 46, 37032 Monteforte d'Alpone, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at Monteforte d'Alpone by appointment.
vineyards.description: Roberto Anselmi famously resigned from the Soave Consorzio and declassified his wines to Veneto IGT as a protest against commercial dilution of the appellation. His San Vincenzo, Capitel Croce and I Capitelli (sweet) remain defining Garganega benchmarks.

vineyards.name: Nino Franco
vineyards.address: Via Garibaldi 147, 31049 Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Valdobbiadene estate by appointment; Rive single-vineyard and Rustico poured.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1919 in Valdobbiadene, Nino Franco is credited with introducing quality Prosecco to international markets in the 1970s under Primo Franco. The estate produces Rive single-hill bottlings and the iconic Rustico brut.

vineyards.name: Bisol 1542
vineyards.address: Via Follo 33, 31049 Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tastings at Valdobbiadene; DOCG Cartizze and Rive range poured.
vineyards.description: One of Italy's oldest documented wine estates, with records dating to 1542 in Valdobbiadene. The Bisol family produces premium Prosecco Superiore DOCG including the prized Cartizze single-hill designation.

vineyards.name: Bortolomiol
vineyards.address: Via Garibaldi 142, 31049 Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine bar and tasting room in Valdobbiadene town; walk-in and appointment visits.
vineyards.description: Giuliana Bortolomiol manages this family estate founded by her father Giuliano in 1949. Known for consistently well-made Valdobbiadene DOCG across multiple styles from brut nature to extra dry.

vineyards.name: Ruggeri and C.
vineyards.address: Via Pra Fontana, 31049 Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visit and tasting at the Valdobbiadene winery by appointment.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1950 in Valdobbiadene, Ruggeri produces classic Prosecco Superiore DOCG including the historic Giustino B label, one of the zone's most-awarded extra-dry expressions.

vineyards.name: Adami
vineyards.address: Via Rovede 27, 31020 Vidor, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Vidor estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: Family estate in Vidor producing Prosecco Superiore DOCG from steep Rive hillside vineyards. The single-vineyard Vigneto Giardino from Rive di Colbertaldo is one of the zone's most admired single-cru expressions.

vineyards.name: Villa Sandi
vineyards.address: Via Erizzo 112, 31035 Crocetta del Montello, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Villa visits and wine tourism at the 17th-century Palladian villa in Crocetta del Montello; tours and tastings available.
vineyards.description: Operating from a 17th-century Palladian villa in Crocetta del Montello, Villa Sandi is one of the Treviso Marca's largest premium producers. The estate spans Cartizze and Rive vineyards across the DOCG zone.

vineyards.name: Col Vetoraz Spumanti
vineyards.address: Loc. Col Vetoraz 1, 31040 Santo Stefano di Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the hilltop estate above Santo Stefano di Valdobbiadene; Cartizze and Rive range.
vineyards.description: A family-owned winery situated above Santo Stefano at the edge of the Cartizze grand cru hill. The estate's elevation and south-facing exposure produce complex, mineral Prosecco Superiore DOCG from pure Glera.

verified.address_quoted: Loc. Col Vetoraz 1, 31040 Santo Stefano di Valdobbiadene (TV)

vineyards.name: Maculan
vineyards.address: Via Castelletto 3, 36042 Breganze, Vicenza, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Breganze cellar; Torcolato dessert wine and Fratta flagship poured.
vineyards.description: The defining estate of Breganze DOC in Vicenza, founded by the Maculan family in 1947. Fausto Maculan's Torcolato dessert wine from dried Vespaiola grapes and the Bordeaux-blend Fratta are the zone's most celebrated bottles.

vineyards.name: Serafini and Vidotto
vineyards.address: Via Ca' di Serra 2, 31044 Nervesa della Battaglia, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at Nervesa della Battaglia by appointment.
vineyards.description: Francesco Serafini and Antonello Vidotto established this Treviso estate in 1986, pioneering quality Bordeaux-variety production on the Montello hills. Il Rosso dell'Abazia is their flagship DOCG red.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ca' di Serra 2, 31044 Nervesa della Battaglia (TV)

vineyards.name: Bele Casel
vineyards.address: Via Cascin 4, 31030 Caerano di San Marco, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at the winery in Caerano di San Marco by appointment; Asolo DOCG and Colli Asolani wines.
vineyards.description: A producer based in the Asolo hills south of Treviso, Bele Casel makes Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG with a focus on traditional field-blend varieties including Perera and Verdiso alongside the dominant Glera.

verified.address_quoted: Via Cascin 4, 31030 Caerano di San Marco (TV)

vineyards.name: Case Paolin
vineyards.address: Via Case Paolin 5, 31030 Volpago del Montello, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Volpago del Montello estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: A small family estate at the foot of Montello in the Asolo DOCG zone. The Giusto family grows indigenous varieties alongside Glera for complex, lower-dosage Asolo Prosecco Superiore.

verified.address_quoted: Via Case Paolin 5, 31030 Volpago del Montello (TV)

vineyards.name: Guerrieri Rizzardi
vineyards.address: Via Verdi 4, 37011 Bardolino, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine museum Museo del Vino di Bardolino on-site; open daily including tasting flight.
vineyards.description: One of the oldest estates in Bardolino, with records dating to 1649, Guerrieri Rizzardi operates vineyards on both Lake Garda shores and in Valpolicella. The on-site Museo del Vino is one of Italy's leading wine museums.

vineyards.name: Cavalchina
vineyards.address: Loc. Cavalchina 7, 37066 Sommacampagna, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Sommacampagna estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: The Piona family estate at Sommacampagna is one of the benchmarks for Bianco di Custoza DOC, producing a crisp blend of Trebbiano, Garganega and Cortese on the morainic hills south of Lake Garda.

vineyards.name: Fasoli Gino
vineyards.address: Via C. Battisti 47, 37030 Colognola ai Colli, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Organic estate visits and tastings by appointment at Colognola ai Colli.
vineyards.description: ICEA-certified organic estate at Colognola ai Colli producing Soave Classico and Valpolicella from certified-organic vineyards. A pioneer of organic viticulture in the Soave zone.

verified.address_quoted: Via C. Battisti 47, 37030 Colognola ai Colli (VR)

vineyards.name: Vignalta
vineyards.address: Via dei Vescovi 5, 35030 Arqua Petrarca, Padova, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tasting at Arqua Petrarca; the Fior d'Arancio DOCG and Colli Euganei reds are the focus.
vineyards.description: Situated in the medieval village of Arqua Petrarca on the Euganean Hills, Vignalta is a benchmark producer for the Colli Euganei Fior d'Arancio DOCG passito from Moscato Giallo and the red Gemola IGT.

vineyards.name: Italo Cescon
vineyards.address: Piazza dei Caduti 3, 31024 Ormelle, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at Ormelle by appointment; Raboso Piave and varietal range poured.
vineyards.description: A leading producer of Piave DOC wines including the rare Raboso Piave, the zone's autochthonous red grape. The Cescon family has championed Raboso's rehabilitation in the Venetian plains since the 1960s.

vineyards.name: Monte Tondo
vineyards.address: Via San Lorenzo 89, 37038 Soave, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Soave estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: The Magnabosco family's estate on the volcanic hillsides east of Soave Classico produces well-structured Soave Superiore DOCG from the Casette Foscarin vineyard on high-elevation basalt terraces.

vineyards.name: Cantina Valpolicella Negrar
vineyards.address: Via Ca' Salgari 2, 37024 Negrar di Valpolicella, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Shop and tasting room open to visitors in Negrar; walk-in friendly.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1933, this cooperative represents 230 family growers at the heart of Valpolicella Classico. The Domaso single-vineyard Amarone from a 14-hectare parcel on the Maternigo hill is the flagship. Open cellar door with no appointment needed.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ca' Salgari 2, 37024 Negrar di Valpolicella (VR)

vineyards.name: Gorgo
vineyards.address: Via Gorgo 17, 37067 Custoza di Valeggio sul Mincio, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the morainic estate in Custoza by appointment.
vineyards.description: A family estate on the glacial morainic amphitheater south of Lake Garda at Custoza. The estate specialises in crisp, food-friendly Bianco di Custoza DOC from Garganega, Trebbiano and Cortese.

verified.address_quoted: Via Gorgo 17, 37067 Custoza di Valeggio sul Mincio (VR)

vineyards.name: Nicolis Angelo e Figli
vineyards.address: Via Villa Girardi 29, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine visits and tastings at San Pietro in Cariano by appointment.
vineyards.description: The Nicolis family has farmed the Villa Girardi estate in San Pietro in Cariano since 1951. The Ambrosan single-vineyard Amarone from the oldest family vines is their prestige bottling.

verified.address_quoted: Via Villa Girardi 29, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Viviani
vineyards.address: Via Mazzano 8, 37020 Mazzano di Negrar, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Mazzano estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: Claudio Viviani farms old Corvina and Rondinella vines on the Mazzano ridge in Negrar, producing a tiny-production Amarone Campo Morar from the estate's highest plots with notable freshness and longevity.

vineyards.name: Le Salette
vineyards.address: Via Pio Brugnoli 11, 37022 Fumane, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar visits and tastings by appointment in Fumane.
vineyards.description: A high-altitude Fumane estate farmed by the Scamperle family since 1986 producing Amarone Pergole Vece from century-old Corvina vines at 450 metres elevation. Monica Scamperle is one of Valpolicella's few female winemakers.

vineyards.name: Santa Sofia
vineyards.address: Via Ca' Dede 61, 37020 Pedemonte di San Pietro in Cariano, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Villa Santa Sofia open for visits and tastings; the historic loggia attributed to Palladio is part of the tour.
vineyards.description: Operating from the 16th-century Villa Santa Sofia in Pedemonte, this producer has been bottling Valpolicella wines since 1811. The Begnoni family combination of history and good-value Amarone attracts steady wine tourism.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ca' Dede 61, 37020 Pedemonte di San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

vineyards.name: Valentina Cubi
vineyards.address: Via Casterne 60, 37022 Fumane, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by appointment at the Fumane estate.
vineyards.description: Valentina Cubi's certified organic estate on the Fumane hillsides produces small-production Amarone and Valpolicella with a focus on indigenous varieties and minimal intervention in both vineyard and cellar.

vineyards.name: Ottella
vineyards.address: Loc. Ottella, 37019 Peschiera del Garda, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Peschiera del Garda estate; Lugana DOC range.
vineyards.description: Montresor family estate at Peschiera del Garda specialising exclusively in Lugana DOC from the Turbiana grape. The Molceo Riserva aged on lees for over a year is among the most complex Lugana bottlings.

vineyards.name: Corte Gardoni
vineyards.address: Loc. Gardoni 5, 37067 Valeggio sul Mincio, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting visits at the Valeggio sul Mincio estate; bookable online.
vineyards.description: The Piccoli family estate at Valeggio sul Mincio on the morainic rim of Lake Garda produces a fresh, saline Bianco di Custoza DOC alongside an interesting Garda Cabernet from south-shore hillside vineyards.

vineyards.name: Cantina di Custoza
vineyards.address: Via Sommacampagna 3, 37060 Custoza di Sommacampagna, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Public shop and tasting room at Custoza; walk-in welcome.
vineyards.description: The Custoza cooperative founded in 1958 is the largest producer in the Bianco di Custoza DOC appellation. High-volume accessible wines from morainic soils at good prices; the walk-in shop is a tourist draw on the Garda circuit.

vineyards.name: Cantine Campagnola
vineyards.address: Via Agnella 9, 37011 Bardolino, Verona, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Bardolino cellar; daily opening.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1889 at the Lake Garda waterfront in Bardolino, Cantine Campagnola is one of the appellation's oldest estates producing light, food-friendly Bardolino Superiore DOCG and a range of Valpolicella.

vineyards.name: Foss Marai
vineyards.address: Via Gravette 2, 31049 Guia di Valdobbiadene, Treviso, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Guia estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: A DOCG Valdobbiadene estate at Guia di Valdobbiadene producing single-terroir Prosecco Superiore with a focus on freshness and minerality from the steep hillside Rive vineyards.
